texto: I have no way to describe this, and I am positive that this is all just a horrible dream I have yet to wake up from. The vice principle is insane. My own uncle is insane. Those stupid kids are insane. Mother Nature is insane...
explicacao: Citação de J. Copeland sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I have no way to describe this, and I am positive that this is all just a horrible dream I have y…” articula motivacao, fantasy, humor em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como humor.
